subject: LIGO/Virgo G194575: LT Spectroscopy of iPTF candidates
body:
I.A. Steele, C.M. Copperwheat, A. S. Piascik (Liverpool JMU) report on behalf of
a larger collaboration:

Observations of 7 of the proposed iPTF candidates (GCN 18497) using theïŋ―ïŋ―
SPRAT spectrograph of the 2.0 metre Liverpool Telescope (La Palma)ïŋ―ïŋ―have been obtained. ïŋ―ïŋ―
The spectral ïŋ―ïŋ―resolution was R~350 and the wavelength range 4000 - 8000 Angstroms.

iPTF-15dln was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-28 at 00:24UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―The transient can not be obviouslyïŋ―ïŋ―
distinguishedïŋ―ïŋ―from the hostïŋ―ïŋ―galaxy in our acquisition images. ïŋ―ïŋ―Our spectrum showsïŋ―ïŋ―absorptionïŋ―ïŋ―
lines of the host galaxy withïŋ―ïŋ―redshift z=0.051.

iPTF-15dkk was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-28 at 20:34UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―The transient can not be obviouslyïŋ―ïŋ―
distinguishedïŋ―ïŋ―from the hostïŋ―ïŋ―galaxy in ourïŋ―ïŋ―acquisition images. ïŋ―ïŋ―Our spectrum showsïŋ―ïŋ―absorptionïŋ―ïŋ―
lines of the host galaxy withïŋ―ïŋ―redshift z=0.061.

iPTF-15dkn was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-28 at 21:09UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―The transient can not be distinguished
from the hostïŋ―ïŋ―galaxy in ourïŋ―ïŋ―acquisition images.ïŋ―ïŋ― Our spectrum showsïŋ―ïŋ―absorption lines of theïŋ―ïŋ―
host galaxy withïŋ―ïŋ―redshift z=0.074.

iPTF-15dkm was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-28 at 21:41UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―Our spectrum shows broad H-alphaïŋ―ïŋ―
emission and is consistent with a Supernova as reported in GCN 18536. ïŋ―ïŋ―

iPTF-15dmn was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-28 at 22:15UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―Our spectrum shows narrow emissionïŋ―ïŋ―
line features typical of an AGN at redshift z=0.056.

iPTF-15dni was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-28 at 23:08UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―The spectrum showsïŋ―ïŋ―weak H-alpha emissionïŋ―ïŋ―
and typical galaxy absorption lines. ïŋ―ïŋ―Both the H-alpha emission and the absorption spectraïŋ―ïŋ―haveïŋ―ïŋ―
redshift z=0.020.

iPTF-15dnh was observedïŋ―ïŋ―on 2015-10-29 at 01:16UT. ïŋ―ïŋ―The transient can not be obviouslyïŋ―ïŋ―
distinguishedïŋ―ïŋ―from the hostïŋ―ïŋ―galaxy in ourïŋ―ïŋ―acquisition images. ïŋ―ïŋ―Our spectrum showsïŋ―ïŋ―absorptionïŋ―ïŋ―
lines of the host galaxy withïŋ―ïŋ―redshift z=0.056.

Furtherïŋ―ïŋ―analysis is ongoing.
